auth.name: Full Name
auth.loginSub: Sign in to manage your appointments and health.
auth.joinSub: Join thousands of patients getting faster, fairer care.
auth.signupHint: Sign up with your email or phone number.
auth.phoneOrEmailHint: Provide at least one — phone or email.
auth.phoneOrEmailRequired: Please provide a phone number or email.
auth.benefit1: Skip the line with digital tickets
auth.benefit2: Find the nearest clinic in seconds
auth.benefit3: Get help in your own language
auth.forgotSub: Enter your phone or email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSentBody: If an account exists for that phone or email, a reset link is on its way.
auth.devTokenBody: No email service is configured. Use this one-time token to reset your password now:
auth.resetSub: Paste the token you received and set a new password.
auth.tokenInvalid: This reset token is invalid or has expired.
auth.otpLink: Sign in with a code instead
auth.otpSub: We'll text a 6-digit code to your phone.
auth.otpInvalid: That code is invalid or expired.

onboard.title: List your clinic on AfyaConnect
onboard.subtitle: Tell us about your clinic. Our team reviews each application within 2 business days.
onboard.submittedBody: We sent you a verification link. Once you confirm your email, our team will review your application.
onboard.duplicate: An application with this email is already in review.
onboard.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
onboard.verifiedBody: Thanks! Our team will review your application and email you when it's approved.
onboard.verifyFailedBody: Please request a new verification link by re-submitting your application.

landing.badge: Trusted by clinics in Kakuma & Kalobeyei
landing.headline: Healthcare without the wait.
landing.subhead: Book appointments, see your live queue position, find clinics, and call for emergency help — all in your own language.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need in one place
landing.featuresSub: Designed for low-bandwidth areas and multilingual communities.

queue.b: Get a digital ticket and watch your position update in real time. No more guessing.

clinics.b: Find the nearest clinic or pharmacy on a map and get directions instantly.

sos.b: One tap alerts healthcare staff with your name, phone, and location.

edu.b: Trusted information on hygiene, nutrition, and maternal health in 4 languages.

lang.b: Full support for English, Swahili, French, and Arabic with right-to-left layout.

secure.b: Encrypted accounts, hashed passwords, and private patient records.

register.b: Sign up with your phone number in under a minute.

book.b: Choose a clinic and get your ticket number instantly.

visit.b: Track the queue from anywhere — only show up when it's your turn.

landing.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your care?
landing.ctaBody: Free to use. No paperwork. Works on any phone.

about.intro: AfyaConnect was built to bring digital healthcare access to refugee camps and underserved communities.

mission.b: Make healthcare faster and more dignified for everyone — regardless of language or location.

vision.b: A world where no one waits hours in line for the care they need.

values.b: Inclusion, privacy, and trust at every step.

about.outro: We partner with clinics, NGOs, and community health workers to deliver real-time care coordination.

home.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your care today.
home.noAppointment: No active appointment yet — let's book one.
home.viewLive: Tap to see live queue progress.

education.title: Health Education
education.intro: Trusted, evidence-based health information — reviewed against guidance from leading global health organisations. Tap any topic to read more and see the original sources.
education.resourcesSub: Research and guidance from WHO, UNHCR and partner health organisations.
education.disclaimer: External links open on the partner organisation’s own website. AfyaConnect is not responsible for the content of external sites. For personal medical advice, speak to a clinician.

sos.confirmBody: Healthcare staff will be notified immediately with your location.
